docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR UNTIMELY SERVICE TO FEB-25-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHOWED THE CLERK, PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH SAID DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BY PERSONAL SERVICE ON 1/4/13 OUTSIDE SAN FRANCISCO; PLAINTIFF DID NOT WANT TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FORM WITH THE COURT, SHE ASKED THAT PROOF OF SERVICE BE RETURNED TO HER. PLAINTIFF SAID THE DEFENDANT HAS DIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETROSYAN, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT DOYLE, FRANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,426.50 FILED BY PETROSYAN, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT DOYLE, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETROSYAN, VERA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOYLE, FRANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 2/24/13 TO DEFENDANT FRANK DOYLE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARE".
